ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing An Inventory & Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sandy Chiu in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition for letters of administration, that the issue is whether to appoint the petitioner without an attorney, that administration is complicated and that mistakes can delay and add costs to the administration. Mr. Chiu reported that his daughter is a corporate attorney and is helping him. The Court stated that if it grants the letters you cannot distribute without a Court order and asked Mr. Chiu what his next steps would be. Mr. Chiu responded that he will obtain letters, marshal the assets, request for a referee and file a petition for final distribution. The Court stated that it will appoint a referee and asked about the assets. Mr. Chiu stated that there is a building which was owned outright by the decedent. The Court stated that real property can be complicated, that it is inclined to grant the petition and that it does not have a proposed order. Mr. Chiu submitted his proposed order. The Court granted the petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order) and set a status on filing the Inventory & Appraisal for February 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and a status on close of estate for June 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
